prompt: A 3D render of a low-poly stylized city street, with simplified cars, blocky buildings, and vibrant color palettes. Rendered from an isometric perspective at 512x512 resolution.
prompt_refined: Generate a 3D rendered, low-poly stylized city street scene. The image should feature simplified, minimalist cars and distinctly blocky buildings. Employ a vibrant, high-contrast color palette. The scene must be presented from a clear isometric perspective.
